name: ADATA Premier DDR4 3200MHz 8GB(8×1) UDIMM 288Pins Desktop PC RAM
highlights: Supports Intel Core 8th/9th/10th series and AMD ZEN 2nd 3rd Ryzen series* * Actual speed may vary by platform or CPU.
description: Premier DDR4 3200 U-DIMM Premier DDR4 3200 U-DIMM represents a new and appealing desktop memory upgrade option, with optimized support for the latest Intel and AMD processors and chipset platforms delivering high performance. Meticulous compliance with JEDEC DDR4 specifications means fast clock frequencies up to 3200MHz combined with 20% power draw savings compared to DDR3. Premier DDR4 3200 modules therefore boost both performance and environmental conservation. Features ● High speed up to 3200
